fault_hypothesis: On line 61, the average is computed by dividing `total` by `window` instead of by `len(tail)`. When the series is shorter than the window, this produces a value smaller than the true arithmetic mean of the available samples.

constraints.intent: After computing avg, it must equal total divided by the actual tail length, not by window.

spec.expr: len(tail__1) >= window or abs(avg__1 * len(tail__1) - total__1) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: When tail is shorter than window, avg must reflect the mean of only the tail elements.
Before avg is used in the return, it must be the true mean of the tail samples.
After passing the warmup check, avg must be the arithmetic mean of the tail, not total/window.
